Off Calendar Feb-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Osca J. Medina & Alicia B. Medina, Defendants in Propria Persona appeared at the hearing today. No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion For Earnings Withholding Order Against Spouse Of Judgment Debtor Pursuant To CCP Section 706.109 is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
